headline: BofA Study: More Americans Favor Buying Over Renting for the First Time Since 2023
summary: For the first time since 2023, a majority of consumers say it's better to buy a home in the current market. According to the latest Bank of America Homebuyer Insights Report, conducted in partnership with Bank of America Institute, 53% of respondents now favor buying over renting or moving in with family (47%).

content.title: BofA Study: More Americans Favor Buying Over Renting for the First Time Since 2023
content.summary: For the first time since 2023, a majority of consumers say it's better to buy a home in the current market. According to the latest Bank of America Homebuyer Insights Report, conducted in partnership with Bank of America Institute, 53% of respondents now favor buying over renting or moving in with family (47%).

thumbnail.caption: Grouped bar chart titled "Percentage of respondents who say they expect prices and interest rates to fall and are waiting until then to buy a home."

headline: Bank of America Sees Interest Rates Exploding Higher Soon: Play It Safe With 4 Dividend Giants

headline: Qualcomm investor day to detail data center plans Wednesday
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America has raised its price target on Qualcomm (QCOM) from $165 to $195, though the firm is maintaining its "Underperform" rating ahead of the company’s Investor Day on Wednesday, June 24. The revised target is the result of BofA rolling its valuation forward to calendar year (CY) 2028 estimates, applying a 15x price-to-earnings (P/E) multiple. headline: How Investors May Respond To Bank of America (BAC) Projecting Three Fed Rate Hikes Starting September
summary: Earlier this month, Bank of America revised its outlook for Federal Reserve policy, now expecting three quarter-point rate hikes starting in September amid persistent inflation and a resilient labor market. This shift in the bank’s Fed view matters because higher-for-longer policy rates can reshape funding costs, loan demand, and profitability assumptions across the financial sector. Next, we’ll examine how Bank of America’s more hawkish Fed forecast could reshape its investment narrative...
